title: Background Transitions: Flat
description: Adds transitions between images in main menu and sets full image in options. It doesn't stretch images!
body:
This pack works like [Background Transitions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/background-transitions) but makes it as overlay + image option background. Scalable with no stretchings.
Inspired by [CustomOptionsMenu](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/customoptionsmenu/).

Optifine not required. #noptifine
Probably works in 1.17 and later.

Has same configuration as Background Transitions.
∟But there is also `HEIGHT` in both `shader/core/position_tex_color` that determines height of one slide to show.

To make it work with you images, place 254 alpha on upper left pixel on images.

Images done by Mojang (Microsoft). Non-commercial use is allowed I think.

Wanted bugs.
